projects.title: AI-Based Career Advisor
projects.description: This AI-powered career advisor provides personalized job recommendations based on skill analysis and real-time job market insights. It integrates with Bing and LinkedIn APIs for real-time job search.
projects.executionPlan: The system uses GPT-4o for skill matching, cosine similarity, and real-time job updates, ensuring accurate and up-to-date recommendations.

projects.title: AI Video Content Summarizer and Chatbot
projects.description: This AI-powered tool transcribes, summarizes, and allows users to interact with video content through a chatbot. It extracts key insights from lectures, meetings, and online videos.
projects.executionPlan: The system uses LLM-based summarization, video transcription, and chatbot features to provide interactive question-answering based on video content.

projects.title: QA AI Assistant for TAC 459
projects.description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based assistant designed for answering course-related queries using lecture materials. It enhances learning through real-time, course-specific answers.
projects.executionPlan: Uses a vector database and LLMs to retrieve relevant course materials, allowing students to receive precise, cited answers with minimal instructor intervention.

projects.title: AI Assistant for Internship/New Grad Job Finder
projects.description: HireWizard is an AI-driven job search assistant that matches job seekers to relevant roles based on resume analysis and job posting data.
projects.executionPlan: Uses NLP-powered resume screening, cosine similarity for job matching, and integrates with job databases like LinkedIn and Indeed to improve hiring outcomes.

projects.title: Sandwich or Salad Chatbot
projects.description: An AI-powered chatbot for customizing sandwich orders and providing personalized meal recommendations using dietary preferences and past orders.
projects.executionPlan: Implements a step-by-step ordering system, cross-selling features, and AI-powered dietary customization to improve customer experience.

projects.title: AI Lecture Assistant: RAG-Driven Avatar for Interactive Course Q&A
projects.description: A virtual AI assistant that answers course-related questions in real-time using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and an interactive avatar.
projects.executionPlan: Uses LLMs for text-based Q&A, voice synthesis for audio responses, and lip-syncing for realistic avatar interactions to enhance student engagement.
